title: Miscreated

notes: Runs out of box. 2560x1440, high settings, bloom off. 45-85 fps, mostly around 65. Even EAC seemed to work as there was no problems joining servers.
title: Miscreated

notes: Game runs well, performance is good. Trouble connecting to servers, try connect 2-3 times then it will log on to server. Didn't load up gear and correct location, it was a fresh spawn even though I was on the same server on Windows the day before. Can't drop items (maybe due to being on the same server previously)
title: Miscreated

notes: I was able to join a server once, but never again. Which makes the game impossible to play. Probably related to EAC anti-cheat.
title: Miscreated

gpu: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1070 With Max-Q Design
notes: Can load up fine and menus work fine, however the game will not allow me to join any server after choosing 22 different servers....
title: Miscreated

notes:
Game started without issue, in fact it started faster then it does in Windows, no problem with server detection and connected to a server fine. Initially I was getting lag when moving my character around but this settled down. I normally play in High settings in Windows but it would only run decently in low/medium in Linux. 
Occasionally I would get dropped back to server select without warning from the game.
